process.commandLine:
python -c "import urllib.request

print('Test 1: Requesting api.github.com...')
try:
    response = urllib.request.urlopen('https://api.github.com', timeout=10)
    print(f'  Status: {response.status}')
except Exception as err:
    print(f'  Error: {err}')

print()
print('Done.')"
